languages.text: "Мы приказали разведчикам искать трупы... замерзшие, еще не очень разложившиеся..." {n}Женщина обреченно склоняет голову, словно пред гильотиной.{/n} "Срезали с тел одежды, омывали их, молились за их души... А потом варили на костях похлебку. В какой-то момент мы действительно наткнулись на бункер с припасами, однако... Наши тела отторгали нормальную пищу. И мы поняли, что были прокляты — ибо теперь лишь человеческая плоть насыщает нас".

traits.locale_text: "Мы приказали разведчикам искать трупы... замерзшие, еще не очень разложившиеся..." {n}Женщина обреченно склоняет голову, словно пред гильотиной.{/n} "Срезали с тел одежды, омывали их, молились за их души... И мы поняли, что были прокляты — ибо теперь лишь человеческая плоть насыщает нас".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

А потом варили на костях похлебку. В какой-то момент мы действительно наткнулись на бункер с припасами, однако... Наши тела отторгали нормальную пищу. И мы поняли, что были прокляты — ибо теперь лишь человеческая плоть насыщает нас".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "We ordered the scouts to look for corpses... Frozen, not too badly decomposed..." {n}The woman meekly lowers her head as if facing a guillotine.{/n} "Cut away their clothes, washed them, prayed for their souls... And then made a stew out of the bones. At some point we did run into a supply warehouse, except... Our bodies rejected proper food. And so we realised we had been cursed — for now we can only draw nourishment from human flesh."

languages.text: "Wir haben die Späher angewiesen, nach Leichen zu suchen... Gefroren, nicht zu stark verwest..." {n}Die Frau senkt demütig den Kopf, als stünde sie vor einer Guillotine.{/n} "Wir schnitten ihre Kleider weg, wuschen sie, beteten für ihre Seelen... Und dann machten wir einen Eintopf aus den Knochen. Irgendwann stießen wir auf ein Versorgungslager, aber... Unsere Körper lehnten richtige Nahrung ab. Und so wurde uns klar, dass wir verflucht waren — denn jetzt können wir uns nur noch von Menschenfleisch ernähren."
languages.original_text: "We ordered the scouts to look for corpses... Frozen, not too badly decomposed..." {n}The woman meekly lowers her head as if facing a guillotine.{/n} "Cut away their clothes, washed them, prayed for their souls... And then made a stew out of the bones. At some point we did run into a supply warehouse, except... Our bodies rejected proper food. And so we realised we had been cursed — for now we can only draw nourishment from human flesh."

languages.text: "Nous avons ordonné aux éclaireurs de chercher des cadavres... Congelés, pas trop décomposés..." {n}La femme baisse docilement la tête, comme face à une guillotine.{/n} "On leur a enlevé leurs vêtements, on les a lavés, on a prié pour leurs âmes... Puis nous avons fait un ragoût avec les os. À un moment donné, nous sommes tombés sur un entrepôt de ravitaillement, sauf que... Nos corps ont rejeté la nourriture. C'est ainsi que nous avons compris que nous avions été maudits. Désormais, nous ne pouvons plus nous nourrir que de chair humaine."
languages.original_text: "We ordered the scouts to look for corpses... Frozen, not too badly decomposed..." {n}The woman meekly lowers her head as if facing a guillotine.{/n} "Cut away their clothes, washed them, prayed for their souls... And then made a stew out of the bones. At some point we did run into a supply warehouse, except... Our bodies rejected proper food. And so we realised we had been cursed — for now we can only draw nourishment from human flesh."

languages.text: "我们命令侦察兵寻找尸体...冷冻的，腐烂程度不太严重的......"{n}女人温顺地低下头，就像面对断头台。{/n}"剪掉他们的衣服，清洗他们，为他们的灵魂祈祷......然后用骨头炖汤在某个时刻，我们确实遇到了一个补给仓库，只是......我们的身体拒绝接受适当的食物于是我们意识到我们被诅咒了 因为现在我们只能从人肉中汲取营养"
languages.original_text: "We ordered the scouts to look for corpses... Frozen, not too badly decomposed..." {n}The woman meekly lowers her head as if facing a guillotine.{/n} "Cut away their clothes, washed them, prayed for their souls... And then made a stew out of the bones. At some point we did run into a supply warehouse, except... Our bodies rejected proper food. And so we realised we had been cursed — for now we can only draw nourishment from human flesh."

languages.text: "Ordenamos a los exploradores buscar cadáveres... Congelados, no muy descompuestos..." {n}La mujer baja mansamente la cabeza como si se enfrentara a una guillotina.{/n} "Les cortaron la ropa, los lavaron, rezaron por sus almas... Y luego hicimos un guiso con los huesos. En algún momento nos encontramos con un almacén de suministros, excepto... Nuestros cuerpos rechazaron la comida adecuada. Y entonces nos dimos cuenta de que habíamos sido maldecidos: ahora sólo podemos nutrirnos de carne humana."
languages.original_text: "We ordered the scouts to look for corpses... Frozen, not too badly decomposed..." {n}The woman meekly lowers her head as if facing a guillotine.{/n} "Cut away their clothes, washed them, prayed for their souls... And then made a stew out of the bones. At some point we did run into a supply warehouse, except... Our bodies rejected proper food. And so we realised we had been cursed — for now we can only draw nourishment from human flesh."

languages.text: "偵察隊に死体の捜索を命じた...凍っていて、腐敗がひどくない..."{n}その女性は、まるでギロチンを前にするかのように、おとなしく頭を下げた。{/n}「服を切り離し、洗い、冥福を祈り...。そして骨でシチューを作った。ある時、補給倉庫に駆け込んだ。私たちの体はまともな食べ物を拒否した。そして、我々は呪われていることに気づいた-今、我々は人肉からしか栄養を得ることができない。"
languages.original_text: "We ordered the scouts to look for corpses... Frozen, not too badly decomposed..." {n}The woman meekly lowers her head as if facing a guillotine.{/n} "Cut away their clothes, washed them, prayed for their souls... And then made a stew out of the bones. At some point we did run into a supply warehouse, except... Our bodies rejected proper food. And so we realised we had been cursed — for now we can only draw nourishment from human flesh."

languages.text: "Gözcülere ceset aramalarını emrettik. Donmuş, çok kötü çürümemiş..." {n}Kadın sanki giyotinle karşı karşıyaymış gibi başını eğiyor.{/n} "Giysilerini kestik, yıkadık, ruhları için dua ettik... Sonra da kemiklerden güveç yaptık. Bir noktada bir erzak deposuna rastladık ama... Vücudumuz doğru düzgün yemek yemeyi reddetti. Ve böylece lanetlendiğimizi fark ettik — artık sadece insan etinden beslenebiliyoruz."
languages.original_text: "We ordered the scouts to look for corpses... Frozen, not too badly decomposed..." {n}The woman meekly lowers her head as if facing a guillotine.{/n} "Cut away their clothes, washed them, prayed for their souls... And then made a stew out of the bones. At some point we did run into a supply warehouse, except... Our bodies rejected proper food. And so we realised we had been cursed — for now we can only draw nourishment from human flesh."
